name: Chocolate Chip Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the softened butter or margarine and brown sugar.
2. Add egg, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add to the creamed mixture; beat well.
5. Stir in semi-sweet chocolate chips.
6. Spread in a greased 9 X 9 X 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 35 minutes.
8. Cool; cut into bars.
9. Makes 32 bars.
